label: Semiconductor Process Inputs
description: Consumables, precursors, and specialty chemistries that gate wafer fab throughput and yield. Small line items on a fab BOM, but every one of them is a hard stop if supply fails or spec drifts.

label: Advanced Packaging Bottlenecks
description: Substrate, interposer, and build-up materials underneath every leading-edge logic, HBM, and AI accelerator. The capacity wall behind the capacity wall.

label: Industrial & Electronic Gas Bottlenecks
description: Ultra-high-purity gases consumed inside deposition, etch, lithography, and chamber-clean steps. Concentrated supply, thin inventories, weaponisable.

label: Critical Mining & Refining Reagents
description: Upstream chemistries and mineral feedstocks that convert ore into the inputs everything else depends on. The layer below the layer below.

label: Battery & Electrification Processing Inputs
description: Specialty salts, solvents, and reagents that convert refined metals into cell-grade chemistry. Where 'critical minerals' actually become batteries.

label: Nuclear & Advanced Energy Bottlenecks
description: Conversion, enrichment, and fuel-fabrication feedstocks. Long lead times, concentrated geopolitically, structurally under-invested.

label: Photonics, Fibre & Optical-System Inputs
description: Precursors and feedstocks for optical fibre, laser, and imaging systems. The invisible layer underneath telecoms and data-centre interconnect.
